name: Four Great Cottage Cheese Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
Prepare each sandwich on basic whole-wheat bread, Syrian flatbreads, or as open-faced sandwiches heated in the oven. Serve with lettuce, crackers, or muffins on the side for a refreshing meal.
Food Exchanges per serving:
1st Sandwich: 1 serving = 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 FATS EXCHANGES (~or~ 3 MEATS EXCHANGES); CAL: 141; PRO: 11gm; FAT: 4gm; CAR: 6gm
2nd Sandwich: 1 serving = 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 70; PRO: 8gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 2gm
3rd Sandwich: 1 serving = 2 MEATS EXCHANGES; CAL: 6gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 1gm
4th Sandwich: 1 serving = 2 MEATS EXCHANGES + 2 FATS EXCHANGES + 2 FRUITS EXCHANGES; CAL: 104; PRO: 6gm; FAT: 2gm; CAR: 11gm
